{{Extension
<!-- ===================================================== -->
<!-- Identity -->
<!-- ===================================================== -->
|schema-version        = 3.0
|extension-id          =
|uuid                  =
|slug                  =
|canonical-name        =
|display-name          =
|short-description     =
|long-description      =
|aliases               =
|namespace             =
|logo                  =
|icon                  =
|banner                =
|website               =

<!-- ===================================================== -->
<!-- Authors -->
<!-- ===================================================== -->
|authors               =
|maintainers           =
|organization          =
|contributors          =
|license               =
|copyright             =
|funding               =
|sponsors              =
|contact               =

<!-- ===================================================== -->
<!-- Classification -->
<!-- ===================================================== -->
|category              =
|subcategory           =
|type                  =
|tags                  =
|keywords              =
|status                =
|maturity              =
|lifecycle             =
|visibility            = public
|featured              =
|verified              =
|deprecated            =
|experimental          =

<!-- ===================================================== -->
<!-- Version -->
<!-- ===================================================== -->
|version               =
|release               =
|build                 =
|commit                =
|branch                =
|release-channel       =
|semantic-version      = yes
|release-date          =
|last-updated          =

<!-- ===================================================== -->
<!-- Platform -->
<!-- ===================================================== -->
|mediawiki             =
|php                   =
|composer              =
|database              =
|webserver             =
|cache                 =
|search-engine         =
|operating-system      =
|container             =
|cloud-ready           =
|kubernetes            =
|helm                  =
|terraform             =

<!-- ===================================================== -->
<!-- Features -->
<!-- ===================================================== -->
|special-pages         =
|hooks                 =
|events                =
|services              =
|jobs                  =
|maintenance-scripts   =
|parser-functions      =
|parser-tags           =
|magic-words           =
|modules               =
|widgets               =
|gadgets               =

<!-- ===================================================== -->
<!-- APIs -->
<!-- ===================================================== -->
|action-api            =
|rest-api              =
|graphql               =
|soap                  =
|webhooks              =
|streaming             =
|async                 =
|openapi               =
|asyncapi              =

<!-- ===================================================== -->
<!-- Security -->
<!-- ===================================================== -->
|permissions           =
|rights                =
|oauth                 =
|openid                =
|csrf                  =
|csp                   =
|rate-limit            =
|audit-log             =
|signed                =
|checksums             =
|security-contact      =
|security-policy       =

<!-- ===================================================== -->
<!-- Storage -->
<!-- ===================================================== -->
|tables                =
|views                 =
|indexes               =
|foreign-keys          =
|schema                =
|migrations            =
|virtual-domains       =
|object-storage        =
|filesystem            =

<!-- ===================================================== -->
<!-- AI -->
<!-- ===================================================== -->
|json-schema           =
|yaml-schema           =
|knowledge-base        =
|llm-index             =
|embedding-model       =
|vector-schema         =
|rag-ready             =
|mcp-server            =
|agent-ready           =

<!-- ===================================================== -->
<!-- Quality -->
<!-- ===================================================== -->
|tests                 =
|unit-tests            =
|integration-tests     =
|e2e-tests             =
|coverage              =
|benchmark             =
|performance           =
|lint                  =
|static-analysis       =
|mutation-testing      =
|fuzzing               =

<!-- ===================================================== -->
<!-- Documentation -->
<!-- ===================================================== -->
|readme                =
|manual                =
|developer-guide       =
|administrator-guide   =
|user-guide            =
|faq                   =
|tutorials             =
|examples              =
|video                 =
|demo                  =
|changelog             =

<!-- ===================================================== -->
<!-- Repository -->
<!-- ===================================================== -->
|repository            =
|mirror                =
|issues                =
|discussions           =
|wiki                  =
|documentation-site    =
|ci                    =
|cd                    =
|releases              =

<!-- ===================================================== -->
<!-- Dependencies -->
<!-- ===================================================== -->
|requires              =
|recommends            =
|suggests              =
|conflicts             =
|replaces              =
|provides              =
|compatible-with       =
|incompatible-with     =

<!-- ===================================================== -->
<!-- Distribution -->
<!-- ===================================================== -->
|download              =
|composer-package      =
|docker-image          =
|oci-image             =
|helm-chart            =
|snap                  =
|flatpak               =
|apt                   =
|rpm                   =
|brew                  =
|winget                =
|nix                   =
|phar                  =
|zip                   =
|tarball               =

<!-- ===================================================== -->
<!-- Observability -->
<!-- ===================================================== -->
|logging               =
|metrics               =
|telemetry             =
|tracing               =
|health-check          =
|prometheus            =
|opentelemetry         =
}}
